title: Database Integrity on SQLite
text: Database Integrity on SQLite Referential integrity is handled by Uniface. Commit and Rollback The commit and rollback instructions are supported by SQLite. Two-phase commit is not supported. Locking The default locking type is optimistic. You can override optimistic locking for individual entities by specifying cautious locking in the entity definition in the application model. For more information, see Locking Considerations for SQLite . read/lock You can specify paranoid locking by using the read/lock ProcScriptinstruction in the read trigger of an entity. U_VERSION The SQLite connector supports the U_VERSION mechanism to improve locking performance. Transactions Transactions are started implicitly by SQLite when required. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
